metadata.notes: Vietnam is a long narrow country — domestic flights essential for north-south travel. Reunification Express train is scenic but slow. All times in hours.

transport_modes.bus: Sleeper bus or open tour bus
transport_modes.flight_then_bus: Fly to nearest airport then bus

hanoi→ho_chi_minh_city.station_note: Noi Bai → Tan Son Nhat Airport. Very frequent. Train exists but 30hrs.

hanoi→da_nang.station_note: Noi Bai → Da Nang Airport. Very frequent.

hanoi→hoi_an.station_note: Noi Bai → Da Nang then bus/taxi to Hoi An (45min).

hanoi→ha_long_bay.station_note: Hanoi → Ha Long Bay by bus or cruise transfer. Classic overnight cruise.

hanoi→hue.station_note: Noi Bai → Phu Bai Airport (Hue). Or train (14hrs scenic).

hanoi→nha_trang.station_note: Noi Bai → Cam Ranh Airport (Nha Trang).

hanoi→sapa.station_note: Hanoi → Lao Cai by overnight train (8hrs) then bus to Sapa (1hr). Classic experience.

hanoi→da_lat.station_note: Noi Bai → Lien Khuong Airport (Da Lat).

hanoi→phu_quoc.station_note: Noi Bai → Phu Quoc International Airport.

ho_chi_minh_city→da_nang.station_note: Tan Son Nhat → Da Nang Airport. Very frequent.

ho_chi_minh_city→hoi_an.station_note: Tan Son Nhat → Da Nang then bus/taxi to Hoi An (45min).

ho_chi_minh_city→ha_long_bay.station_note: Tan Son Nhat → Noi Bai (Hanoi) then bus to Ha Long Bay.

ho_chi_minh_city→hue.station_note: Tan Son Nhat → Phu Bai Airport (Hue).

ho_chi_minh_city→nha_trang.station_note: Tan Son Nhat → Cam Ranh Airport. Or sleeper bus (9hrs).

ho_chi_minh_city→sapa.station_note: Tan Son Nhat → Noi Bai then overnight train to Lao Cai then bus to Sapa.

ho_chi_minh_city→da_lat.station_note: Tan Son Nhat → Lien Khuong Airport (Da Lat). Or bus (7hrs scenic).

ho_chi_minh_city→phu_quoc.station_note: Tan Son Nhat → Phu Quoc International Airport. Very frequent.

da_nang→hoi_an.station_note: Da Nang → Hoi An by taxi or shuttle bus. Effectively same destination area.

da_nang→ha_long_bay.station_note: Da Nang → Noi Bai (Hanoi) then bus to Ha Long Bay.

da_nang→hue.station_note: Da Nang → Hue by bus over Hai Van Pass. Scenic mountain road. Easy combination.

da_nang→nha_trang.station_note: Da Nang → Cam Ranh Airport (Nha Trang).

da_nang→sapa.station_note: Da Nang → Hanoi then overnight train to Lao Cai then bus to Sapa.

da_nang→da_lat.station_note: Da Nang → Lien Khuong Airport (Da Lat).

da_nang→phu_quoc.station_note: Da Nang → Phu Quoc Airport direct or via HCMC.

hoi_an→ha_long_bay.station_note: Hoi An → Da Nang Airport → Hanoi then bus to Ha Long Bay.

hoi_an→hue.station_note: Hoi An → Hue by bus over Hai Van Pass. Classic scenic route.

hoi_an→nha_trang.station_note: Hoi An → Da Nang Airport → Cam Ranh (Nha Trang).

hoi_an→sapa.station_note: Hoi An → Da Nang → Hanoi → Lao Cai → Sapa.

hoi_an→da_lat.station_note: Hoi An → Da Nang → Da Lat.

hoi_an→phu_quoc.station_note: Hoi An → Da Nang → Phu Quoc.

ha_long_bay→hue.station_note: Ha Long Bay → Hanoi → Phu Bai (Hue).

ha_long_bay→nha_trang.station_note: Ha Long Bay → Hanoi → Cam Ranh (Nha Trang).

ha_long_bay→sapa.station_note: Ha Long Bay → Hanoi then overnight train to Lao Cai then bus to Sapa.

ha_long_bay→da_lat.station_note: Ha Long Bay → Hanoi → Da Lat.

ha_long_bay→phu_quoc.station_note: Ha Long Bay → Hanoi → Phu Quoc.

hue→nha_trang.station_note: Hue → Nha Trang by Reunification Express. Scenic coastal route. Or fly via Da Nang.

hue→sapa.station_note: Hue → Hanoi then overnight train to Lao Cai then bus to Sapa.

hue→da_lat.station_note: Phu Bai (Hue) → Da Nang → Da Lat.

nha_trang→sapa.station_note: Cam Ranh → Hanoi then overnight train to Lao Cai then bus to Sapa.

nha_trang→da_lat.station_note: Nha Trang → Da Lat by bus. Scenic mountain road. Easy combination.

nha_trang→phu_quoc.station_note: Cam Ranh (Nha Trang) → Phu Quoc Airport. Or via HCMC.

sapa→da_lat.station_note: Sapa → Lao Cai → Hanoi → Da Lat. Very long journey.

sapa→phu_quoc.station_note: Sapa → Hanoi → Phu Quoc. Very long journey.

da_lat→phu_quoc.station_note: Lien Khuong (Da Lat) → Phu Quoc Airport. Or via HCMC.
